allow: PowerShell(for \($i = 1; $i -le 8; $i++\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8001/api/restocking-orders" -ErrorAction Stop -TimeoutSec 2; Write-Host "✓ Backend restarted successfully!"; Write-Host "✓ Restocking API is responding"; $data = $response.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "✓ Current restocking orders: $\($data.Count\)"; break } catch { Write-Host "Checking backend startup... attempt $i" } })
PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8001/" -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Backend is running"; $response.StatusCode } catch { Write-Host "Backend error: $_" })
